description:
If you’re looking for room to spread out without giving up everyday convenience near Savannah, 308 Kerry Dr. in Richmond Hill’s Kenmare neighborhood offers the space and flexibility many buyers search for. Set on a flat .82-acre lot, this home provides generous room sizes throughout and a layout designed to adapt as life changes.

Inside, you’ll find flexible spaces right from the entry, with rooms featuring custom trim and large windows that work well as a formal dining areas or private offices. The main living room centers around a fireplace with tile surround and built-ins, and opens into a bright, custom kitchen with an oversized island with seating, granite countertops, stainless appliances, and a corner pantry. The layout keeps everything connected while still offering defined spaces for daily living.

A bedroom and full bath on the main floor provide a true guest suite or flexible option for multi-generational living. Upstairs, the primary suite features vaulted ceilings, a spacious bath with dual vanities, a separate tub and shower, and direct access to a custom closet large enough for its own island. Additional bedrooms are generously sized and share a hall bath with dual vanities, while a bonus room with double doors and a closet offers the option for a media room, playroom, or that sought-after 5th bedroom.

Outdoor living is just as functional. A spacious screened room overlooks the fully fenced backyard and green space beyond, offering privacy and room to relax or entertain. The two-car garage adds everyday convenience and storage.

Located just minutes from Richmond Hill’s schools, Fisherman's Co-op boat ramp/dock/trails, and this home supports commuting to Hunter AAF, Fort Stewart, Gulfstream, and the Hyundai Metaplant and other employers throughout the greater Savannah area.

For buyers relocating to Coastal Georgia, this home offers flexible living space, large rooms, and outdoor space that make long-term living feel easy and comfortable.

A Captivating Lowcountry Escape in The Ford Field & River Club. Tucked beneath sweeping moss-draped oaks, this charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath Lowcountry cottage captures the essence of timeless Southern beauty. Spanning 1,400 square feet across two inviting levels, the home blends classic architecture with modern comfort, ideally positioned just steps from the Clubhouse and Village within one of the South's most prestigious private enclaves.Step inside to a dramatic vaulted great room filled with natural light and wrapped in warmth, where rich textures and elegant details define every corner. The kitchen, complete with stainless steel appliances and custom cabinetry, flows effortlessly into the main living space, perfect for easy gatherings or quiet moments by the fire.The screened-in porch invites you to slow down and take in the serenity of the surrounding landscape, morning coffee beneath the oaks, sunset cocktails, or long, unhurried evenings spent listening to the sounds of nature. Upstairs and down, each bedroom is a serene retreat, complemented by spa-inspired baths and refined Lowcountry design elements. A welcoming front porch frames the home with enduring charm and makes every arrival feel like a homecoming.Formed by 1,800 acres of storied land and waterways, The Ford Field & River Club is a private residential golf and sporting community along Georgia's great Ogeechee River, where Southern hospitality meets modern luxury. Here, life moves with the rhythm of the tides: mornings spent casting a line from the Deepwater Marina, afternoons on the Pete Dye championship golf course, and evenings riding through oak-shaded trails from the Equestrian Center.Anchored by the historic 7,000-square-foot Main House, once the Lowcountry dream home of Clara and Henry Ford, this community celebrates tradition and elegance at every turn. From its 36-slip marina and award-winning golf course to the Naturalist Center, gardens, and charming architectural enclaves, The Ford offers an experience that transcends the ordinary.To live here is to embrace a one-of-a-kind expression of Southern style, a place where every sunrise feels unhurried, every evening lingers a little longer, and every detail reflects the art of Lowcountry living.

Discover the Stardom floor plan in Richmond Hill, GA, where function meets style. This new home design features an open layout with a spacious kitchen overlooking a tray-ceiling gathering room and a covered lanai. Screen your patio or add a pool bath to enjoy effortless indoor-outdoor living. The private Owner's Suite with a walk-in closet adds comfort and convenience.

NEW PRICE- OPEN House this Sunday, Located in the desirable Waterways Township, this stunning home showcases high-end finishes, thoughtful design, elegant coastal style throughout. Step inside to a welcoming foyer that opens to a bright and inviting open-concept floor plan, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The heart of the home features a beautifully designed kitchen with a sophisticated backsplash, designer lighting, and chic paint colors that create a warm and inviting atmosphere. The spacious living area is anchored by a heart pine accent electric fireplace, adding character and Lowcountry charm. Owner’s suite on main level offers comfort & privacy, creating a relaxing retreat within the home. Upstairs, you’ll find four additional bedrooms and two full baths, including a private guest suite with its own bath and walk-in closet—perfect for visitors or extended family. One of the most enchanting features of the home is the fairytale-style second-level porch, offering a peaceful space to relax and enjoy the surrounding beauty. A welcoming foyer introduces the home’s bright and airy open floor plan, where thoughtful design and elegant details create a warm, sophisticated atmosphere. Additional features include, butler pantry/coffee bar and desk area that opens onto a private screened porch that flows into a fenced backyard area, also the side entry double car garage that has a private entrance with builtin bench and cubbies plus a huge laundry with cabnetry and sink area. Fresh paint, floors, window coverings and well cared for home that makes this  home ready for you. A perfect blend of  modern style with timeless Southern character, Residents of Waterways enjoy incredible amenities and a lifestyle surrounded by nature, all just a short drive to Savannah, airport, historical Coastal Georgia Coastline to enjoy and beyond!

PRICE ADJUSTMENT! Beautifully maintained original-owner home situated on a .53-acre corner lot. This inviting property features a welcoming foyer, a separate formal dining room, and an eat-in kitchen perfect for everyday living. The living room boasts a vaulted ceiling and a cozy wood-burning fireplace, creating a warm and open gathering space. French doors lead to a screened porch, ideal for relaxing or entertaining while enjoying the outdoors.

The thoughtfully designed split floor plan offers two bedrooms on the main level along with a spacious primary suite featuring an updated en-suite bathroom and walk-in closet. Upstairs, you’ll find a large bonus room with a half bath, perfect for a home office, guest space, or media room.

Additional highlights include a newer roof, a two-car garage, and plenty of outdoor space on the generous lot.

Conveniently located near the new I-95 exit and just a short drive to Ft. Stewart, the community also offers fantastic amenities including a pool and a boat dock with ramp, providing the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and recreation.

Home is PROPOSED construction! Stunning Saltwater marsh views- This remarkable home features a spacious open floorplan concept that offers up to 4 bedrooms with a dedicated study/flex space. The screened lanai option is perfect for entertaining and enjoying the outdoors. The primary bedroom boasts a spacious walk-in closet, ensuring plenty of storage space for all your needs! Don’t miss the opportunity to build this beautiful home with its desirable features all within the gated community of Waterways! The Dalton, part of the Georgian Collection, maximizes its 2,575 square feet with a layout designed for both formal and casual living. Off the foyer, a formal dining room and separate living room or study provide flexibility, while the great room flows into the kitchen and breakfast area, separated by a raised bar ledge.
Upstairs, you'll find three secondary bedrooms, a full bath, laundry room, and an expansive primary suite featuring a sitting area, garden tub, separate shower, double vanities, and two walk-in closets.
Perfect for buyers looking for spacious new construction homes in Coastal Georgia, the Dalton blends traditional charm with modern open living in communities throughout the Brunswick, Kingsland, and Savannah areas.

Step into the Mitchell floor plan in Richmond Hill, GA, and experience a new home design that perfectly complements your lifestyle. Enjoy the open kitchen, café, and gathering room ideal for hosting or relaxing. The spacious upstairs loft and Owner's Suite with a walk-in closet offer added convenience. Discover how this new construction blends comfort and flexibility for modern living.

Where Lowcountry beauty meets timeless design, this custom-built estate at The Ford Field & River Club tells a story of Southern grace and quiet luxury. Set on 5.5 private acres with serene water and golf course views, the home welcomes you with wide porches, grand oaks, and peaceful natural surroundings. Inside, every detail reflects comfort and craftsmanship-from the gourmet kitchen and formal dining area to two cozy fireplaces perfect for Lowcountry evenings. The main house offers three bedrooms, including a serene primary suite with dual walk-in closets and a spa-like bath. Just beyond, a beautifully appointed guest house provides three more bedrooms, a full kitchen, and inviting living spaces-ideal for hosting family and friends. Here, mornings begin with golden light over the marsh and days unfold with golf, equestrian adventures, and waterfront pursuits-all within one of the South's most exclusive and storied communities. (Main residence was built in 2021, guest house was built in 1999)

Nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac, this beautifully maintained home offers comfort, convenience, and valuable upgrades. A brand-new roof installed in 2024 provides peace of mind, while the spacious two-car garage and oversized driveway ensure plenty of parking for family and guests. Inside, you’ll love the functional layout featuring a primary bedroom on the main floor for easy living and added privacy, complete with a newly updated shower in the primary bathroom. The bright living spaces flow seamlessly, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere perfect for both relaxing and entertaining. Ample storage throughout the home adds everyday convenience and functionality. Step outside to enjoy the fully fenced backyard—ideal for pets, play, or hosting gatherings. Located close to local schools, shopping, dining, and all that Richmond Hill has to offer, this property combines value, location, and thoughtful features in one exceptional package. Don’t miss your chance to call this charming home yours!

SELLER OFFERING $10,000 TOWARD BUYER’S CLOSING COSTS AND/OR RATE BUYDOWN! Located on a private wooded lot in the Waterways Community of Richmond Hill, this home is more than just a residence; it’s a retreat. With over 3,500 square feet on 0.68 acres, it offers the perfect blend of comfort, luxury, and space. The main floor features an open living area that flows seamlessly into the gourmet kitchen. Upstairs, you’ll find a versatile bonus room, a primary suite with a spa-inspired en-suite bath with a large walk-in closet, along with three additional bedrooms and two full bathrooms. Life in Waterways is all about community and the outdoors—residents enjoy a marina with deep-water access, resort-style pool, community garden, scenic trails, and the new tavern.

Elegant, expansive, and exceptionally flexible, the Nantucket Signature is designed to adapt beautifully to your lifestyle. With 2,936 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, this two-story home offers 4 to 5 bedrooms, 2.5 to 3 bathrooms, and an oversized 2-car garage.
Choose from four stunning exterior elevations, each featuring a welcoming covered front porch that adds charm and curb appeal.
Step through the front door into a spacious foyer flanked by a formal living room and dining room-perfect for hosting guests or holiday gatherings. At the rear of the home, a large kitchen awaits with endless customization options, a 7-foot island with bar seating, and a generous walk-in pantry. The kitchen flows into a bright breakfast room with access to the back patio, and beyond that, a sprawling family room ideal for everyday relaxation.
Also on the main level, a large mudroom and powder room sit just inside the garage entrance for added convenience. The first floor also offers two distinct layout options for a guest or in-law suite, each with a private full bath.
Upstairs, you'll find three spacious secondary bedrooms, each with walk-in closets, as well as a centrally located laundry room and shared full bath.
The crown jewel of the second floor is the owner's suite, spanning an impressive 400 sq. ft., including a serene sitting area. Optional tray ceilings elevate the space with architectural elegance. The suite also features an expansive dual walk-in closet (100 sq. f

The Hatteras is a thoughtfully designed two-story home that balances open living spaces with private retreats, making it a favorite in many new home communities throughout Coastal Georgia.
On the main floor, the kitchen, dining, and living areas flow together effortlessly, creating a welcoming space where families naturally gather. A flexible office or study offers the perfect spot for working from home, while a secondary bedroom and full bath provide comfortable accommodations for guests. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite offers a peaceful escape, complete with a sitting area, two walk-in closets, and a relaxing bath with soaking tub and separate shower. Three additional bedrooms provide plenty of room for family, hobbies, or visiting friends.
For buyers looking for new construction homes in Savannah, Brunswick, Richmond Hill, Rincon, and Kingsland, the Hatteras combines everyday functionality with comfortable, modern design.

Ready to spend the summer by the pool? 10 Valley Oak Drive has you covered. Centrally located in the Live Oak neighborhood of Richmond Hill, this home features 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and over 1,400 square feet of living space. All situated on a corner lot, just steps away from the community pool. Inside the home, the living room is light and bright with updated flooring-no carpet. The spacious kitchen has ample room for a dining table and opens to the backyard. The primary bedroom features tray ceilings and an en-suite bathroom with a soaking tub, separate shower, and double vanities. The additional two bedrooms are nicely sized. The two-car garage is great for parking or storage. This home is move-in ready, while still providing a blank slate for you to personalize and make it your own. Behind the home, the backyard is ready to be fenced for kids and pets to play. Conveniently located on the same block as the community pool, playground, and basketball court. Bryan County offers highly ranked Richmond Hill schools. This location is close to I-95 and US-17, granting easy access to Savannah and major employers, including Gulfstream, the Hyundai Metaplant, and nearby military bases Fort Stewart and Hunter Army Airfield. The attractive price point, neighborhood amenities, and affordable HOA fees make this home hard to pass up.

Experience executive living in this stunning 6-bedroom, 3.5-bath residence, perfectly blending grand entertaining spaces with everyday comfort. The open foyer leads to a light-filled great room and a formal dining room featuring a convenient butler’s pass-thru. At the heart of the home, the chef’s kitchen boasts staggered gray cabinetry, quartz countertops, stainless appliances, walk-in-pantry, and a sun-drenched breakfast nook. The main floor features a private guest bedroom with full bath, while an elegant oak staircase leads to five additional bedrooms, loft, and a laundry room with a built-in folding station. Retreat to the primary suite, highlighted by a tray ceiling, an expansive walk-in closet, and a spa-like bath with a garden tub and separate shower. Outside, a covered low-country style front porch and spacious back deck with exquisite views of the woods. Located in Richmond Hill’s Buckhead East community with resort style amenities including two pools and a playground. This home is just a short walk from McAllister Elementary and DeVaul Henderson Park’s extensive sports complex and dog park. Enjoy easy access to public boat ramps, I-95, Savannah, and Fort Stewart. Schedule your private tour today!

*Motivated Seller* Welcome to 102 Egrets Way Lane, where space, comfort, and scenic views come together! This beautiful brick 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home features a 2.5 car garage, along with a versatile layout. Enjoy a formal sitting room, dining room, and a spacious family room or flex space to suit your lifestyle. Upstairs you'll find the primary bedroom, complete with a balcony overlooking the backyard and 2 stocked ponds, an en-suite with a large walk in closet and 3 other spacious bedrooms. Enjoy the screened in back porch and fully fenced in yard with double gate access, perfect for entertaining. The home consists of newer LVP, fresh paint, and updated appliances.  Waterford Landing amenities consist of 3 miles of walking paths, pool and clubhouse, driving range, basketball court, park with pavilion, boat/rv storage, 26 slip boat dock, and miles of green space with stocked ponds throughout. This home truly checks all the boxes!

RARE OPPORTUNITY TO OWN 5 ACRES IN RICHMOND HILL!
This one-of-a-kind home was built as a master carpenter’s custom residence, where exceptional craftsmanship and detailed trim work are showcased throughout.

Perfect for hobbyists and outdoor enthusiasts, the property includes a 24' x 40' shop with lean-to, both equipped with power, water, and propane heat—ideal for RVs, boats, and equipment.

Situated on five acres of dry land, the property features mature trees, an established garden, a chicken coop, and an above-ground pool for enjoying outdoor living at home. Conveniently located just 2.5 miles from Kilkenny Marina and Demeries Boat Ramp, this home offers a rare blend of craftsmanship, privacy, and coastal lifestyle living.

Furniture to convey with an accepted offer.

The Hudson by Ernest Homes offers modern, functional design across two stories - ideal for homeowners seeking style, comfort, and convenience. At 2,341 heated square feet, this three-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath plan with a 1.5 car garage is tailored for families, professionals, and those looking to upscale or relocate in the Savannah area.

On the main level, the Hudson features an open-concept layout that seamlessly connects the kitchen, dining area, and great room - perfect for entertaining or everyday family life. Upstairs, the Hudson includes three well-sized bedrooms. The owner's suite delivers a private retreat, complete with its own bath and generous closet space. Two additional bedrooms share easy access to the second full bath, while the half bath on the main floor supports guests and daily convenience.

With its balanced design and thoughtful use of space, the Hudson offers both versatility and lasting appeal. Whether you're building in Richmond Hill, GA or Guyton (Effingham County), GA, this plan is within reach. In a market that includes relocators from Fort Stewart, Hunter Army Airfield, Gulfstream, and the growing Hyundai Metaplant community, the Hudson is primed to offer a quality home you can build now and personaliz

Enjoy the versatility of a flex room just off the foyer that can serve as an extra bedroom, study or office. Don't miss a beat in the kitchen, open to the café and gathering room.

Your home search might just be over after this one!

Located in the highly sought-after Buckhead East community in Richmond Hill, this 3,325 sq ft home truly has a little bit of everything. Off to the left, there’s a formal dining room that flows straight into the kitchen, featuring granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a layout that opens up to both the breakfast area and the living room—perfect for everyday living and entertaining. All three bedrooms, along with the laundry room, are conveniently located on the upper level. Bryan County School District.  Positioned minutes from shopping, schools, dining, parks and community services. If you're looking for a lifestyle that offers peace and quiet, welcome to 1851 I.G. Lanier. This beautiful 15-acre estate is surrounded by woods and nature, with walking trails that wind around a pond and throughout the property. Enjoy blooming flowers throughout the year, a custom-built greenhouse, a cypress pond stocked with fish, and two fenced vegetable gardens ready for planting. The property also has workshop and a covered shelter with 4 bays for parking RVs, boats, or other toys. 1851 I.G. Lanier features a custom-built log home with a wraparound porch, ideally located between Statesboro and Savannah-just 10 minutes from the Hyundai plant, 30 minutes to Pooler, and 30 minutes to Statesboro. Set back from the road for privacy, the property is gated and fenced. The home was built in 1998, using logs from Satterwhite Log Homes of Longview, Texas. The logs are crafted from trees that died from natural causes and left standing to dry naturally for 30 years in dry-climate conditions, making dead-standing timber ideal material for long-term log home performance; they were sourced primarily from U.S. National Forests in the American West. The drying process condenses the wood fibers, creating excellent natural insulation. The home averages approximately $140 per month for electricity. The logs measure 7.5 inches with tongue-and-groove construction and a classic D-shape profile. The wraparound porch provides shade throughout the day and offers peaceful views of the cypress pond, blooming flower gardens, and outdoor activities like fishing or children playing. North, East, South, and West porches offer excellent protection for the logs from rain and intense sunlight. Two fenced garden areas allow for abundant vegetable production, and the back garden includes mature blueberry bushes that produce gallons of berries each year. Wildlife is plentiful on the property, with frequent sightings of deer, turkeys, rabbits, and ducks - making this estate a true nature retreat.

If you're looking for a lifestyle that offers peace and quiet, welcome to 1851 I.G. Lanier. This beautiful 15-acre estate is surrounded by woods and nature, with walking trails that wind around a pond and throughout the property. Enjoy blooming flowers throughout the year, a custom-built greenhouse, a cypress pond stocked with fish, and two fenced vegetable gardens ready for planting.  The property also has workshop and a covered  shelter with 4 bays for parking RVs, boats, or other toys.  1851 I.G. Lanier features a custom-built log home with a wraparound porch, ideally located between Statesboro and Savannah-just 10 minutes from the Hyundai plant, 30 minutes to Pooler, and 30 minutes to Statesboro.  Set back from the road for privacy, the property is gated and fenced. The home was built in 1998, using logs from Satterwhite Log Homes of Longview, Texas. The logs are crafted from trees that died from natural causes and left standing to dry naturally for 30 years in dry-climate conditions, making dead-standing timber ideal material for long-term log home performance; they were sourced primarily from U.S. National Forests in the American West.   The drying process condenses the wood fibers, creating excellent natural insulation. The home averages approximately $140 per month for electricity. The logs measure 7.5 inches with tongue-and-groove construction and a classic D-shape profile.  The wraparound porch provides shade throughout the day and offers peaceful views of the cypress pond, blooming flower gardens, and outdoor activities like fishing or children playing. North, East, South, and West porches offer excellent protection for the logs from rain and intense sunlight. Two fenced garden areas allow for abundant vegetable production, and the back garden includes mature blueberry bushes that produce gallons of berries each year.  Wildlife is plentiful on the property, with frequent sightings of deer, turkeys, rabbits, ducks, and squirrels-making this estate a true nature retreat.

Located in the heart of Savannah, 223 West 39th Street presents a rare opportunity for homeowners, investors, and developers alike. Zoned TN-2 (Traditional Neighborhood-2), this property offers exceptional flexibility and long-term potential in a rapidly growing area. TN-2 zoning is designed to support walkable, in-town living and allows for a variety of residential uses. With this designation, you have the ability to build or convert the property into single-family, duplex, or multi-family housing, making it ideal for generating rental income or creating a multi-unit investment. The zoning also supports accessory dwelling units (ADUs), giving you the option to add a carriage house or garage apartment for additional income or guest space. Positioned on an oversized corner lot, the property provides ample room for expansion, redevelopment, or outdoor living enhancements. Whether you’re looking to renovate and hold, build new construction, or develop multiple units, the possibilities here are strong.
Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Savannah, SCAD, hospitals, shopping, and dining, this property combines location, zoning flexibility, and investment potential a powerful combination in today’s market.

This southern half of the Frederick Ball double house is part of an elite group of residences academically and meticulously restored during the 1990s by Mills Lane IV of The Beehive Foundation in partnership with historic preservation architect Harvie Jones of Huntsville, Alabama. Their goal was to restore important houses as authentically as possible yet have them serve as livable residential properties. Early 19th-century carpentry and finishing techniques were used whenever and wherever practicable. The house has substantial original fittings including rare 12 over 12 window sashes, two mantels, the staircase, a lovely archway with a lantern hook in the front hall, most of the woodwork, with wainscoting and pine flooring throughout. The original floorplan was restored except in the southern back quadrants, which were configured to house the modern conveniences of a kitchen and half-bath on the first floor, and a full-bath area, washer and dryer, and a large walk-in closet on the second floor. A modern, Federal-style double-porch, appropriate for the house and typical for Savannah, was added off the back of the house during the 1990 restoration to create additional living space. The cottage has a courtyard and off-street parking. The restoration of the three Frederick Ball houses (the main house and the double house next door) received a 1991 Preservation Award from Historic Savannah Foundation. Due to the many substantial changes made over time to the northern half of the double house, this southern half is now under protective covenants with The Beehive Foundation. The Frederick Ball Houses are located on Columbia Square, are centrally located within Savannah's Historic Landmark District and in walking distance of most anywhere within the area. Full documentation of the restorations of the three Frederick Ball Houses, including plans, photographs, and correspondence, is on file at The Beehive Foundation in Savannah, Georgia.

The interior spans approximately 4,200 square feet, retaining masterful 19th-century details such as soaring 12-foot ceilings, original heart pine flooring, and ornate plaster crown moldings. The parlor level is meticulously designed for effortless hosting, featuring working pocket doors that seamlessly connect the grand public areas and a formal dining room illuminated by a crystal chandelier. The upper levels serve as a private sanctuary, led by a full floor  master suite that includes "his and hers" full bathrooms and dedicated closets, alongside a cozy central sitting or media room and laundry fa--cilities. On the fourth floor, two generous guest bedrooms are joined by a full bathroom and a historic trunk room which allows for versatile uses. The property offers exceptional versatility; the garden level currently functions as a leased commercial space with a reliable tenant, yet it retains a bedroom, full bathroom, and kitchen, allowing for easy reintegration into the main residence. Outside, a large private courtyard creates a secluded garden oasis, leading to a detached garage and workshop. This structure is crowned by a separate studio apartment, offering a self-contained space ideal for rental income, guest overflow, or a private home office. This  J.J. Dale Row house remains one of Savannah's most distinguished residential offerings for 2026.
